name: Swiss Steak from Fred Goslin
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green Bell Pepper, thinly sliced
1 medium Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the round steak; pound well to an even thickness.
2. Cut the steak into 6-8 even pieces.
3. Mix flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish; coat the beef pieces with the mixture.
4. Place the coated beef and any remaining seasoning mix in a rectangular baking dish, 12" x 18", or a 10-inch square casserole dish.
5. Combine celery, onion, and green bell pepper in a small bowl; microwave on high (100%) until vegetables are tender for 3-5 minutes.
6. Mix the cooked vegetables with the remaining ingredients and pour over the beef.
7. Cover and microwave on high (100%) for five minutes.
8. Reduce power to medium (50%); continue microwaving until the beef is tender, about 40-50 minutes, rearranging pieces after half the cooking time.
